title: lathyrus laevigatus subsp. libani
intro: Lathyrus laevigatus subsp. libani, also known as the Syrian pea or Syrian grass pea, is a plant species belonging to the legume family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels, making it a potential treatment for cardiovascular diseases. The plant is rich in protein, fiber, and minerals, offering various health benefits such as improving digestion and reducing inflammation. Lathyrus laevigatus subsp. libani can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or supplement, with its seeds and leaves being used in traditional medicine.
